title: trisetum loeflingianum var. cavanillesii
intro: Trisetum loeflingianum var. cavanillesii is a type of grass plant, scientifically known as a type of Poaceae family member, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Trisetum loeflingianum var. cavanillesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe bronchial irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy among local communities.
